title: He sold ROCKS as pets — $1M in 6 months
desc:
In April 1975, California ad man Gary Dahl heard his friends complaining about their pets and made a joke: the perfect pet needs nothing — a rock. He bought smooth beach stones for about a penny each, packed them in gift boxes with air holes and straw, and wrote the real product: a deadpan training manual ('sit' and 'stay' were easy; 'roll over' worked best on a hill). Price: $3.95. Over a million sold by Christmas 1975, and Dahl became a millionaire in about six months — off rocks that did absolutely nothing.

#BrokeToBuilt #history #petrock #invention
